name: Mellow Oval Pool Deck Plan - 4x4 Pool Deck for 15x30 Oval Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15x30 oval above-ground pools
Ultra-compact 4x4 deck footprint - ideal for extremely tight spaces
Optimized standing and walking clearance for safe pool entry
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Minimalist design - perfect for fast builds & lowest material cost
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with complete material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' x 30' oval above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Mellow Oval Pool Deck Plan turns your 15x30 above-ground oval pool into a clean, ultra-compact, and functional backyard upgrade. Featuring a minimal 4x4 platform layout, this design delivers safe and simple pool access while maintaining the smallest possible footprint - perfect for tight spaces, budget-conscious builds, and quick DIY installations. Mellow blends simplicity, safety, and modern outdoor style into one perfectly efficient pool deck solution. Key Features
